summary: Completed testing for Telemetry Persistence Window and Certification Trend Chart features (iter 125). All 11 backend API tests passed. All 8 frontend UI tests passed. The new GET /api/e2e-demo/telemetry/history endpoint correctly returns aggregated data with period filtering. The CertificationTrendChart component renders correctly with period toggle buttons and summary statistics.

minor.issue: Uses deprecated 'regex' parameter in FastAPI Query - should use 'pattern' instead

issues: Recharts shows dimension warning (-1 height/width) when chart container is not visible - only cosmetic, doesn't affect functionality

passed_tests: ✅ GET /api/e2e-demo/telemetry/history returns default hourly period with correct structure
✅ POST /api/e2e-demo/run creates a snapshot in sandbox_telemetry_snapshots collection
✅ Data points contain all expected fields: period, avg_score, avg_latency_ms, total_runs, sandbox_runs, simulation_runs, avg_success_rate, max_score, min_score, sandbox_rate_pct
✅ Existing GET /api/e2e-demo/telemetry endpoint still works correctly (no regression)
✅ Existing POST /api/e2e-demo/run returns all expected fields including certification_score, mode, environment
✅ Limit parameter correctly controls max data points returned
✅ Frontend: Trend chart card renders with data-testid='trend-chart-card'
✅ Frontend: Period toggle buttons (Saatlik/Gunluk/Haftalik) render with data-testid='trend-period-hourly/daily/weekly'
✅ Frontend: Chart updates when switching periods
✅ Frontend: Trend chart summary row shows TOPLAM, ORT. SKOR, ORT. LATENCY
✅ Frontend: Period buttons apply active styling when clicked
✅ Frontend: AreaChart visualization displays with proper Y-axis (0-100 scale)
action_items: Optional: Update diagnostics_router.py line 341 to use 'pattern' instead of deprecated 'regex' parameter
critical_code_review_comments: sandbox_telemetry_service.py record_snapshot() correctly stores hour/day/week bucket fields for aggregation
get_telemetry_history() correctly uses MongoDB aggregation pipeline with $group by time bucket
Frontend CertificationTrendChart component correctly fetches data with period/supplier/limit parameters
Chart uses Recharts AreaChart with proper gradient fills and tooltip formatting
Summary row correctly calculates totals from trendData array using reduce()
seed_data_creation: Snapshots are auto-created when running tests via POST /api/e2e-demo/run
context_for_next_testing_agent: New telemetry history features added in iteration 125: 1) GET /api/e2e-demo/telemetry/history returns aggregated snapshot data with period filtering (hourly/daily/weekly). 2) POST /api/e2e-demo/run now calls record_snapshot() to store per-test telemetry in sandbox_telemetry_snapshots collection. 3) Frontend CertificationTrendChart component (data-testid='trend-chart-card') displays trend visualization with period toggle buttons (data-testid='trend-period-hourly/daily/weekly'). 4) Summary row shows TOPLAM (total runs), ORT. SKOR (avg score %), ORT. LATENCY (avg latency ms). Page URL: /app/admin/certification-console

api_verification.GET /api/e2e-demo/telemetry/history: ✅ 200 - Returns period, data array, total_points, supplier_filter, timestamp
api_verification.GET /api/e2e-demo/telemetry/history?peri: ✅ 200 - Default period, groups by hour bucket

frontend_verification.CertificationTrendChart card: data-testid='trend-chart-card' - renders with chart and summary
frontend_verification.Summary row elements: TOPLAM (Total), ORT. SKOR (Avg Score %), ORT. LATENCY (Avg Latency ms)
frontend_verification.Chart visualization: Recharts AreaChart with gradient fills, Y-axis 0-100, X-axis shows time periods

telemetry_data_structure.period: string - the time bucket identifier (e.g., '2026-03-16T14:00:00Z' for hourly)
telemetry_data_structure.avg_score: number - average certification score across tests in this period
telemetry_data_structure.avg_latency_ms: number - average total duration in ms
telemetry_data_structure.total_runs: number - count of tests in this period
telemetry_data_structure.sandbox_runs: number - count of sandbox mode tests
telemetry_data_structure.simulation_runs: number - count of simulation mode tests
telemetry_data_structure.sandbox_rate_pct: number - percentage of tests using sandbox mode
